title: Randomized Ores
description: Makes mining completely unbearable. Good pack for those who love the look of 20w14∞
body:
# What does this pack do?
Randomizes textures of ores in overworld and nether, making it challenging to mine needed ores.

![Gif of changing normal ores to randomized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78707a3b8492090cc2956f180fb119317908b000.gif)

## More stuff about pack
1. This pack should work with other texture packs
2. Ancient debris made as rare texture to match vanilla rarity
3. Gilded blackstone left untouched, because it's a bastion's "ore"
4. Overworld ores all have the same rate of appearing, almost (look good enough)
